note: v394: Budget is now a real paycheck bill planner (replaces the visual scaffold). Set a pay schedule — every 2 weeks / twice a month / weekly / once a month — and the calendar computes each month's actual paydays (biweekly/weekly even catch the occasional 3rd 'extra' paycheck). Add recurring bills (name, due day, amount, and an optional reimbursed amount for the part someone pays back, with an editable label like 'Kids'). Each bill drops onto the last paycheck on/before its due date, so every payday shows exactly what to pay; the hero shows your net 'you pay' after reimbursements. Stored on the profile — run the new SQL (pay_schedule, budget_bills, reimburse_label on profiles).
